message:
chore(gitignore): exclude beads viewer local config and cache directory

Add .bv/ to .gitignore to prevent beads viewer (bv) artifacts from being
tracked. The bv tool stores user-specific configuration and cached data
in this directory, which should remain local to each developer's machine.

This follows the existing pattern established for the parent .beads/
directory (database, daemon logs, lock files) by also ignoring the
viewer's runtime artifacts. Including .bv/ in version control would:

- Cause unnecessary merge conflicts between developers
- Expose machine-specific paths and preferences
- Bloat the repository with cache data that can be regenerated

The beads ecosystem (.beads/ for daemon state, .bv/ for viewer state)
is used for agent session management and workflow tracking, separate
from the core SRPS functionality of system resource protection and
priority tuning.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -22,3 +22,6 @@
 *.jpeg
 *.png
 *.gif
+
+# bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
+.bv/
